name: Relics and Rarities
overview: Set in a mysterious curio shop, creator Deborah Ann Woll brings a unique twist to the world of Dungeons & Dragons with gripping storytelling and arcane objects. Join Woll and a party of special guests each week as they face her puzzles and challenges!

trailers.title: The Haunting of Benthem Manor with Matthew Lillard | Relics and Rarities | Episode 1
